title: cleomella palmeri
intro: Cleomella palmeri, also known as Palmer's cleome, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cleomella palmeri include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting against bacterial infections. The plant is prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be applied topically to affected areas or taken orally in small doses under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
